description: A regional hospital network has just deployed Snipe-IT (http://localhost:8000, logged in as admin) and needs role-based access control configured for three new IT staff. Create a permission group named Help Desk Level 1 with View, Checkout, and Checkin permissions for Assets, and View permissions for Users (all other permissions should be denied). Create a second permission group named IT Auditor with View permissions for Assets, Licenses, Accessories, Consumables, Components, and Users (all other permissions should be denied). Create three user accounts with the following details: Maria Santos (Username: msantos, Email: maria.santos@hospitalnet.org, Password: Snipe1T@2025, Employee Number: EMP-2087, Job Title: Help Desk Technician, Group: Help Desk Level 1); James Chen (Username: jchen, Email: james.chen@hospitalnet.org, Password: Snipe1T@2025, Employee Number: EMP-2088, Job Title: Help Desk Technician, Group: Help Desk Level 1); and Priya Patel (Username: ppatel, Email: priya.patel@hospitalnet.org, Password: Snipe1T@2025, Employee Number: EMP-2089, Job Title: IT Compliance Auditor, Group: IT Auditor).
